phrases.text_local: Onde fica o parque de táxis mais próximo?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW PAH-ruh-kih DIH TAHK-seesh MEYESH PRAW-see-moo?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o parque de táxis exterior.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PAH-ruh-kih DIH TAHK-seesh ehsh-tih-REEOHR.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the taxi rank outside.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the taxi rank outside.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW PAH-ruh-kih DIH TAHK-seesh ehsh-tih-REEOHR.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o parque de táxis exterior.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso validar os meus bilhetes?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo vuh-lee-DAHR OOSH MEHOOSH bee-LYEH-tihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Yellow validation machines are standard across Portuguese railway networks.

likely_response.local: Use as máquinas de bilhetes automáticas.
likely_response.pronunciation: OO-zih UHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh ow-too-MAH-tee-kuhsh.

responses.phonetic: OO-zih UHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh ow-too-MAH-tee-kuhsh.
responses.french: Use as máquinas de bilhetes automáticas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where CP information desk is
phrases.text_local: Sabe dizer-me onde está o balcão de informações CP?
phrases.pronunciation: SA-bee di-ZER-mee ON-dee es-TA oo BAL-sowng jee in-for-ma-SOYNS SEE-PEH?
phrases.cultural_note: Information desks are strategically placed near waiting areas for passenger convenience.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, junto à sala de espera.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, next to the waiting room.

responses.english: Good morning, next to the waiting room.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ZHOONNG-too AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh.
responses.french: Bom dia, junto à sala de espera.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where automatic ticket machines are
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar as máquinas de bilhetes automáticas?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee POH-soo en-kon-TRAHR ahsh-MAH-kee-nahsh jee-bee-YEH-cheesh ow-toh-MAH-kee-kahsh
phrases.cultural_note: Self-service machines are grouped near staffed counters for assistance if needed.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, estão junto à bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ihsh-TOWN ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, they are next to the ticket office.

responses.english: Good morning, they are next to the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ihsh-TOWN ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.french: Bom dia, estão junto à bilheteira.

phrases.cultural_note: In Portuguese railway stations, ticket validation is mandatory before boarding regional trains; the yellow validators are often placed near the ticket machines or at platform entrances.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Validação de Bilhetes.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh vuh-lee-duh-SOWN DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs for Ticket Validation.

responses.english: Follow the signs for Ticket Validation.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh vuh-lee-duh-SOWN DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para Validação de Bilhetes.

phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese stations often place footbridges near main concourses for platform access.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a passarela pedonal.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-suh-REH-luh peh-doo-NAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the footbridge.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the footbridge.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH puh-suh-REH-luh peh-doo-NAHL.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a passarela pedonal.

phrases.text_local: Com licença, onde posso validar o bilhete?
phrases.pronunciation: KOHM lee-SAYNG-suh, OHNG-dih PAW-soo vuh-lee-DAHR AW bee-LYEH-tih?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket validation is required before boarding in many Portuguese stations; automatic machines are typically near the entrance or ticket office.

likely_response.translation_en: At the automatic machine, on the right.

responses.english: At the automatic machine, on the right.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the CP ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Olá, onde é a bilheteira CP?
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih EH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh seh-PEH?
phrases.cultural_note: CP (Comboios de Portugal) is the national railway company; the ticket office sells tickets and provides assistance.

likely_response.local: À entrada, ao lado do quiosco.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH ayngt-RAH-duh, OW LAH-doo DOO KEEOHSH-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: At the entrance, next to the kiosk.

responses.english: At the entrance, next to the kiosk.
responses.phonetic: AH ayngt-RAH-duh, OW LAH-doo DOO KEEOHSH-koo.
responses.french: À entrada, ao lado do quiosco.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso validar o meu bilhete?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo vuh-lee-DAHR AW MEHOO bee-LYEH-tih?

likely_response.local: Valide o seu bilhete nas máquinas automáticas ou no balcão de informações CP.
likely_response.pronunciation: vuh-LEE-dih AW SEHOO bee-LYEH-tih NUHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh ow-too-MAH-tee-kuhsh OHW NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH seh-PEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Validate your ticket at the automatic ticket machines or at the CP information desk.

responses.english: Validate your ticket at the automatic ticket machines or at the CP information desk.
responses.phonetic: vuh-LEE-dih AW SEHOO bee-LYEH-tih NUHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh ow-too-MAH-tee-kuhsh OHW NOO bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH seh-PEH.
responses.french: Valide o seu bilhete nas máquinas automáticas ou no balcão de informações CP.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where CP ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza a bilheteira da CP?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH seh-PEH?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket counters are typically central for visibility and queue management.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the ticket office.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a bilheteira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the waiting room is
phrases.text_local: Com licença, onde fica a sala de espera?
phrases.pronunciation: KOHM lee-SAYNG-suh, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH SHPEH-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: The waiting room at Évora station includes a quiet zone; it's a comfortable area for travelers.

likely_response.local: Ao fundo do corredor, à esquerda.
likely_response.pronunciation: OW FOONNG-doo DOO koo-rih-DOHR, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the corridor, on the left.

responses.english: At the end of the corridor, on the left.
responses.phonetic: OW FOONNG-doo DOO koo-rih-DOHR, AH SHKEH-ruh-duh.
responses.french: Ao fundo do corredor, à esquerda.
